arts.ttl: Michail Antonio’s Custom Kit Rips During Premier League Match
arts.sum: Michail Antonio's custom West Ham home shirt made headlines again today—not for its unique design but for a wardrobe malfunction.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United send clear Alexander Isak message amid transfer talk
arts.sum: Newcastle United fans have sent a clear message to Alexander Isak amid talk over his future ahead of the January transfer window. It’s perhaps no surprise then that other clubs have been linked with an interest ahead of the Isak and the Magpies are in action on Monday night as they take on West Ham United at St James’ Park.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Under-fire Lopetegui looks for West Ham win against Newcastle
arts.sum: All the action at St James’ Park, ESPN has updates throughout

arts.ttl: Newcastle v West Ham: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Updates on the action at St James’ Park from 8pm GMT Football Daily newsletter | And you can email Michael 4 min: The home side fashion the first half-chance as Joelinton slips in Isak, who runs in behind and shoots high and wide from a tight angle. Kilman marshalled Isak nicely there. 2 min: Lloyd Kelly, in his first start for Newcastle since September, wins the first header against Antonio. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Soler starts as Hammers make one change for Newcastle United trip
arts.sum: West Ham United: Fabiański, Wan-Bissaka, Todibo, Kilman, Emerson, Soler, Souček, Paquetá, Summerville, Bowen ©, Antonio The substitutes’ bench will be filled by Scarles, Dinos Mavropanos, goalkeeper Alphonse Areola, full-backs Vladimír Coufal and Aaron Cresswell, midfielders Rodríguez and Andy Irving, winger Luis Guilherme and striker Danny Ings.

arts.ttl: 'Unlikely Potter or Moyes will replace Cooper' | Who's next for Leicester?
arts.sum: Following Steve Cooper's departure from Leicester City, Sky Sports' Danyal Khan says it's unlikely that Graham Potter or David Moyes will replace the Welshman at the club.
